name: Sour Dough Silver Dollar Hotcakes (Farm Journal Cookbook)
recipeInstructions:
1. About 12 hours before breakfast, mix starter, flour, milk, and salt.
2. Cover and let stand.
3. Just before frying, remove 1 cup batter to replenish starter.
4. To the remaining batter, add baking soda, eggs, shortening or oil, and sugar.
5. Mix well.
6. Spoon batter on griddle about 2 inches in diameter.
Makes about 30 hotcakes.
